name: steward
description: Meta-plugin that audits and maintains ccpraxis, and onboards projects to it. /steward:setup deterministically prepares the current project (local data dir + self-gitignore, migrates legacy .claude-plans into blueprints, registers for vault backup). /steward:audit fans out read-only subagents (per-system red-team + code review, cross-cutting integration checks, fresh-user persona, fresh-Claude install simulator, optional test runner) and aggregates findings into a dated report.
